title: Excel template process mapping and FMEA
author: Per Halvorsen
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A FMEA analysis tool with prebuild radiation oncology process steps and sub steps that can be modified based on clinical workflow. Also contains an instruction for use and a sample completed document.
steps_raw: A FMEA analysis tool with prebuild radiation oncology process steps and sub steps that can be modified based on clinical workflow. Also contains an instruction for use and a sample completed document.
